strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience with deep, relevant expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) generators.
Exceptional background in software testing and TDD, including creating custom test runners and organizing testing workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, which is a key component of the primary stack.
Does not explicitly list experience with the specific requested testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright).
Running a concurrent founder role (GISCollective) alongside full-time employment may warrant a brief discussion about bandwidth.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly qualified engineer with an MIT Computer Science degree and extensive experience in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node, React). His recent hands-on work with AI agents and MCP, combined with his exceptional foundation in testing, cloud infrastructure, and architecture, makes him a near-perfect fit despite missing specific framework keywords like Nest.js and Vitest.
